prerequisites.value: Bonded Mind, Share Spells, ability to deliver spells through an animal companion, eidolon, familiar, or phantom, caster level 3rd.

description.value:
**Benefit:** Whenever you are in contact with an ally who has the Bonded Mind feat and you cast a touch spell, you can designate the ally as the âtoucher,â as per the deliver touch spells familiar ability.

**Special:** Delivery (Teamwork) Your partner can carry your spells to their targets.
